- Introduced: `3.4.10`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://docs.digitalasset.com/operate/3.4/scaladoc/com/digitalasset/canton/version/BaseVersioningCompanion.html)

**Signature**

```text
trait BaseVersioningCompanion[ValueClass <: HasRepresentativeProtocolVersion, Context, DeserializedValueClass <: HasRepresentativeProtocolVersion, Dependency] extends AnyRef
```

<a id="type-com-digitalasset-canton-version-hasrepresentativeprotocolversion"></a>

### `com.digitalasset.canton.version.HasRepresentativeProtocolVersion`

- Introduced: `3.4.10`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://docs.digitalasset.com/operate/3.4/scaladoc/com/digitalasset/canton/version/HasRepresentativeProtocolVersion.html)

**Signature**

```text
trait HasRepresentativeProtocolVersion extends AnyRef
```

**Summary**

We have a correspondence {Proto version} &lt;-&gt; {[protocol version]}: each proto version correspond to a list of consecutive protocol versions. The representative is one instance of this list, usually the smallest value. In other words, the Proto versions induce an equivalence relation on the list of protocol version, thus use of representative.

<a id="type-com-digitalasset-canton-version-hasversionedmessagewithcontextcompanion"></a>

### `com.digitalasset.canton.version.HasVersionedMessageWithContextCompanion`

- Introduced: `3.4.10`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://docs.digitalasset.com/operate/3.4/scaladoc/com/digitalasset/canton/version/HasVersionedMessageWithContextCompanion.html)

**Signature**

```text
trait HasVersionedMessageWithContextCompanion[ValueClass, Ctx] extends HasVersionedMessageCompanionCommon[ValueClass]
```

**Summary**

Traits for the companion objects of classes that implement HasVersionedWrapper. They provide default methods. Unlike HasVersionedMessageCompanion these traits allow to pass additional context to the conversion methods.

**Signature**

```text
final case class ParticipantProtocolVersion(version: ProtocolVersion) extends UniformCantonConfigValidation with Product with Serializable
```

**Summary**

<a id="type-com-digitalasset-canton-version-protocolversion"></a>

### `com.digitalasset.canton.version.ProtocolVersion`

- Introduced: `3.4.10`
- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

Upstream docs: [Open](https://docs.digitalasset.com/operate/3.4/scaladoc/com/digitalasset/canton/version/ProtocolVersion.html)

**Signature**

```text
sealed case class ProtocolVersion extends Ordered[ProtocolVersion] with PrettyPrinting with Product with Serializable
```

**Summary**

A Canton protocol version is a snapshot of how the Canton protocols, that nodes use to communicate, function at a certain point in time (e.g., this ‘snapshot’ contains the information what exactly a SubmissionRequest to the sequencer looks like and how exactly a Sequencer handles a call of the SendAsync RPC). It is supposed to capture everything that is involved in two different Canton nodes interacting with each other.

**Signature**

```text
sealed trait ProtocolVersionValidation extends Product with Serializable
```

Upstream docs: [Open](https://docs.digitalasset.com/operate/3.4/scaladoc/com/digitalasset/canton/version/StorageProtoVersion.html)

**Signature**

```text
trait StorageProtoVersion extends AnyRef
```

**Summary**

Marker trait for Protobuf messages generated by scalapb that are used only to persist data in node storage. These messages are never exchanged as part of a protocol.

**Members**

No members found for this type in the configured artifacts.

- Deprecated: -
- Removed: -

**Signature**

```text
final case class SynchronizerProtocolVersion(version: ProtocolVersion) extends Product with Serializable
```

**Summary**

Wrapper around a ProtocolVersion so we can verify during configuration loading that synchronizer operators only configure a ProtocolVersion which is supported by the corresponding sequencer release.

**Signature**

